overall.description: Gameplay footage from the video game Subnautica, showing a first-person perspective of a diver standing on a futuristic underwater base platform at night, then swimming through a dark cave tunnel, and exploring a sunlit kelp forest with tall swaying seaweed.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic offshore research platform at night

events.description: character walks to platform edge and jumps into the water

agents.ego_description: walking across the metal platform between illuminated habitat modules

entered.detail: futuristic spherical habitat module with blue exterior lighting
illuminated dome structure with visible interior lights and windows
metal deck with railings connecting the habitat modules
small potted bioluminescent plants on the platform surface

segments.scene_description: Standing on a futuristic offshore platform at night, surrounded by illuminated spherical habitat modules. The metal walkway stretches between the domed structures under a starry sky, with small glowing plants decorating the deck.

events.description: passing bioluminescent purple coral formations glowing on the cave walls
exiting the narrow cave into open underwater area with light from above

agents.ego_description: swimming downward through the narrow cave passage toward the light at the exit

entered.detail: dark jagged rock walls of the underwater cave tunnel
glowing purple organic formations attached to the cave ceiling
bright light visible at the end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: Swimming through a narrow underwater cave tunnel with dark rocky walls. Bioluminescent purple coral formations provide dim lighting along the passage as the camera descends toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

events.description: entering dense kelp forest with tall swaying seaweed stalks
weaving between kelp stalks while swimming deeper into the forest

agents.ego_description: swimming through the kelp forest, navigating between tall seaweed stalks and examining the underwater environment

entered.detail: bright sunlight filtering through the water surface creating a shimmering effect
tall dark green seaweed reaching toward the surface, swaying in the current
rocky outcrops and terrain at the base of the kelp forest

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the cave into a wide-open underwater kelp forest bathed in sunlight filtering from the surface. Tall swaying seaweed stalks rise from the rocky seafloor in all directions as the camera swims forward through the dense aquatic vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a high-tech nocturnal outpost down into the depths of a vibrant, sunlit ocean. It begins on a futuristic offshore platform at night, moving along metal walkways between illuminated spherical habitat modules under a starry sky. The camera then plunges beneath the surface, transitioning into a narrow underwater cave tunnel where dark rocky walls are lit only by dim, bioluminescent purple coral. As the diver descends, the oppressive darkness gives way to a bright exit, finally emerging into a wide-open kelp forest. The scene expands into a brilliant aquatic landscape where sunlight filters from the surface, illuminating tall swaying seaweed stalks that rise from the rocky seafloor.
